prediction.review_text: In today's fast-paced business environment, streamlining operations isn't just beneficial—it's essential for sustainable growth. 🚀 At CodingRippler, we focus on harnessing orchestration tools like n8n and Zapier to create seamless workflows that automate repetitive tasks and enhance efficiency. actual.review_text:
Interacting with different business owners every day made me realize a major shift.

Most businesses don’t need another tool, they just need their existing tools to talk to each other.

That’s what modern orchestration really is, not coding, not AI magic, but connecting everything so it works in sync.

Imagine invoices arriving by email, getting verified automatically, updating your accounts, and sending a Slack update without anyone touching a spreadsheet.

That’s exactly what we’ve been helping businesses achieve using our ready-to-use orchestration templates.

It doesn’t have to be complex or expensive anymore, it just has to be connected.

I recently wrote about a real example of this in action, You can read the full story below.

If you’re exploring how orchestration could simplify your business operations, feel free to reach out. I’d love to share what’s working for others.

You can also book a quick discovery call here: [

Or take a look at what some of our clients have achieved: [

#BusinessGrowth #WorkflowOrchestration #DigitalTransformation #NoCode #n8n #Operations #OrchestrationTemplates

actual.review_text:
Սիրելի հայրենակիցներ,

եթե դեռ ծանոթ չեք SASTIC նախաձեռնությանը և դրա նպատակներին, կարող եք շատ կարճ ժամանակում ծանոթանալ այստեղ․ 

Յուրաքանչյուր անհատի օգնությունը շատ կարևոր է այս գործին ավելի մեծ ընթացք տալու և ծրագրերն ավելի էֆեկտիվ իրագործելու համար։ Կարող եք օժանդակել թե ֆինանսապես, և թե ձեր մասնագիտական հմտություններով։

Եթե կասկածներ ունեք ծրագրերի, կամ ընդհանրապես նախաձեռնության վերաբերյալ, SASTIC-ի անդամները մեծ հաճույքով կպատասխանեն ձեր հարցերին․ ։

Thank you Eldorado friends for all support and great work that has changed so many customers' business, that has contributed to show that it is possible to do innovation and research in Brazil.
Thank you also to all partners and customers that gave me the chance to learn with you.
Now, it is time to start a new journey full of new innovation challenges. 
 Let's empower every people to innovate.
#newjourney #gratefulness #innovation

actual.review_text:
Centralized Customer Payments for Headquarters and Subsidiaries by Komathi T SAP Labs India 

Welcome to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Two-tier ERP blog series. 

In this blog, let’s look at centralized customer payments in a Two-tier deployment model.

S/4HANA customer payments is a public cloud solution delivered in the SAP Cloud Platform, which provides a self-service offering to enable our customers to deploy electronic bill presentment and payment processes. In this Two-tier scenario, where headquarters is running On-Premise (ECC6+ or S/4HANA On-premise) and the subsidiary is running on S/4HANA cloud, SAP S/4HANA cloud for customer payment serves as a centralized customer payment solution for both headquarter as well as subsidiary.

While running in such two-tier landscape, processing repetitive customer inquiries regarding invoice copies, underpayment, dispute cases, matching incoming payments with open items because of Time zone issues, Language barriers, Large numbers of documents would be a great challenge to the accounts team.

Check out the full blog here

Not many of you may know but I spent a lot of my career in the pathology laboratories doing software engineering.

I have often thought how AI will revolutionize patient care, especially in terms of diagnostic services such as radiology and pathology. So it was exciting to see new research from my current employer Microsoft and my former, the UW, rolling research into exactly this, using AI to improve cancer outcomes.

Thinking of the good old days when Rodney Schmidt and I were trying "change the world" with software!

I'm excited to share some insights on the latest routing management capabilities we've introduced in Azure! 🌐 The advancements in User Defined Routes (UDR) are game-changing, simplifying routing configurations at scale while enhancing performance and maintaining a strong security-first approach.

Excited to share some insights on the latest routing management capabilities in Azure! 🌐 As we continue to enhance our cloud networking features, I’m particularly thrilled about the advancements in User Defined Routes (UDR) and how they simplify routing configurations at scale. This not only improves performance but also ensures a security-first approach in managing our network traffic. 

A big thank you to the team for their hard work and dedication in bringing these features to life! Let’s keep pushing the boundaries of what’s possible in cloud networking. 💪 #Azure #CloudNetworking #RoutingManagement #TeamWork

actual.review_text:
Today is a great day for managing your routing at scale in Azure! I'm happy to announce that my team is delivering the capability to manage your user-defined route tables at scale.

One of the complexities customers face with route tables in Azure is the management of linking them to multiple subnets and then managing the routing rules at a larger scale. With route management functionality coming into Azure Virtual Network Manager, customers can now simply create a single definition and apply it to hundreds of subnets with just a few clicks.

Additionally customers have asked for the capability to have more than the 400 rule limit that exists today. Customers who use AVNM for their route management will be able to create up to 1,000 rules in their route tables. This gives our customers the ability to create more complex and detailed route tables.

Great work by my team and I look forward to hearing how this feature helps your organization.

actual_review_data.review_text:
Interacting with different business owners every day made me realize a major shift.

Most businesses don’t need another tool, they just need their existing tools to talk to each other.

That’s what modern orchestration really is, not coding, not AI magic, but connecting everything so it works in sync.

Imagine invoices arriving by email, getting verified automatically, updating your accounts, and sending a Slack update without anyone touching a spreadsheet.

That’s exactly what we’ve been helping businesses achieve using our ready-to-use orchestration templates.

It doesn’t have to be complex or expensive anymore, it just has to be connected.

I recently wrote about a real example of this in action, You can read the full story below.

If you’re exploring how orchestration could simplify your business operations, feel free to reach out. I’d love to share what’s working for others.

You can also book a quick discovery call here: [

Or take a look at what some of our clients have achieved: [

actual_review_data.review_text:
Սիրելի հայրենակիցներ,

եթե դեռ ծանոթ չեք SASTIC նախաձեռնությանը և դրա նպատակներին, կարող եք շատ կարճ ժամանակում ծանոթանալ այստեղ․ 

Յուրաքանչյուր անհատի օգնությունը շատ կարևոր է այս գործին ավելի մեծ ընթացք տալու և ծրագրերն ավելի էֆեկտիվ իրագործելու համար։ Կարող եք օժանդակել թե ֆինանսապես, և թե ձեր մասնագիտական հմտություններով։

Եթե կասկածներ ունեք ծրագրերի, կամ ընդհանրապես նախաձեռնության վերաբերյալ, SASTIC-ի անդամները մեծ հաճույքով կպատասխանեն ձեր հարցերին․ ։

Հուսով եմ՝ պատերազմի օրերին արտահայտված համախմբվածությունը և հայրենիքի զարգացմանն ուղղված գործունեությունը գոնե որոշ չափով կարտահայտվի նաև այստեղ։

Շնորհակալություն ուշադրության համար

actual_review_data.review_text:
In the last week I decided to close a cycle in my life. I finished a fantastic journey of 15 years working on research and development at Eldorado. 
Thank you Eldorado friends for all support and great work that has changed so many customers' business, that has contributed to show that it is possible to do innovation and research in Brazil.
Thank you also to all partners and customers that gave me the chance to learn with you.
Now, it is time to start a new journey full of new innovation challenges. 
 Let's empower every people to innovate.
#newjourney #gratefulness #innovation

actual_review_data.review_text:
Centralized Customer Payments for Headquarters and Subsidiaries by Komathi T SAP Labs India 

Welcome to the SAP S/4HANA Cloud Two-tier ERP blog series. 

In this blog, let’s look at centralized customer payments in a Two-tier deployment model.

S/4HANA customer payments is a public cloud solution delivered in the SAP Cloud Platform, which provides a self-service offering to enable our customers to deploy electronic bill presentment and payment processes. In this Two-tier scenario, where headquarters is running On-Premise (ECC6+ or S/4HANA On-premise) and the subsidiary is running on S/4HANA cloud, SAP S/4HANA cloud for customer payment serves as a centralized customer payment solution for both headquarter as well as subsidiary.

While running in such two-tier landscape, processing repetitive customer inquiries regarding invoice copies, underpayment, dispute cases, matching incoming payments with open items because of Time zone issues, Language barriers, Large numbers of documents would be a great challenge to the accounts team.

Check out the full blog here

I have often thought how AI will revolutionize patient care, especially in terms of diagnostic services such as radiology and pathology. So it was exciting to see new research from my current employer Microsoft and my former, the UW, rolling research into exactly this, using AI to improve cancer outcomes.

Thinking of the good old days when Rodney Schmidt and I were trying "change the world" with software!

f20ab826-b48b-42cf-be34-de640b4befa1_rev.product_description: Routing management capabilities in cloud environments

actual_review_data.review_text:
Today is a great day for managing your routing at scale in Azure! I'm happy to announce that my team is delivering the capability to manage your user-defined route tables at scale.

One of the complexities customers face with route tables in Azure is the management of linking them to multiple subnets and then managing the routing rules at a larger scale. With route management functionality coming into Azure Virtual Network Manager, customers can now simply create a single definition and apply it to hundreds of subnets with just a few clicks.

Additionally customers have asked for the capability to have more than the 400 rule limit that exists today. Customers who use AVNM for their route management will be able to create up to 1,000 rules in their route tables. This gives our customers the ability to create more complex and detailed route tables.

Great work by my team and I look forward to hearing how this feature helps your organization.
